apps.name: Mosaic
apps.description: Tiny art, big feelings. A pixel editor with drawing tools, fills, undo/redo, and PNG export when you're ready to share your 32x32 masterpiece.
apps.author: Regionally Famous

apps.name: Ledger
apps.description: Get paid. Track clients, generate polished invoices, and log payments without ever leaving WordPress.
apps.author: Regionally Famous

apps.name: Flow
apps.description: Stop doomscrolling, start doing. A Pomodoro timer with ambient soundscapes, per-session task lists, and a heatmap so you can see exactly which days you crushed it.
apps.author: Regionally Famous

apps.name: Board
apps.description: Cards. Columns. Drag. Drop. Done. A no-nonsense project board that shows you exactly what's happening, what's stuck, and what you can finally move to "done."
apps.author: Regionally Famous

apps.name: Swatch
apps.description: Pick colors like you mean it. Full HSL editing, harmony rules, WCAG contrast checks, and one-click export to CSS, Tailwind, or SVG.
apps.author: Regionally Famous

apps.name: Sine
apps.description: A full synthesizer living inside your WordPress admin. Four waveforms, ADSR envelope, a resonant filter, and a step sequencer — all on pure Web Audio.
apps.author: Regionally Famous

apps.name: Tome
apps.description: A fast internal wiki for your team. Write in markdown, organise into pages, find anything instantly.
apps.author: Regionally Famous

bundles.name: Rainfall (Discover)
bundles.description: A collision-aware rain scene that respects wallpaper surfaces. Ships as a remote .wp to demonstrate cross-type catalog installs.
bundles.author: Regionally Famous

bundles.name: Origami (Discover)
bundles.description: Paper-fold icon pack for the WordPress dock. Demonstrates remote icon-set installation from the Discover shelf.
bundles.author: Regionally Famous

bundles.name: Confetti (Discover)
bundles.description: A tiny desktop widget that throws confetti when you click it. First remote widget example.
bundles.author: Regionally Famous
